subcodes.first_line: O Khalil! Arise to serve the Glorious Cause in these days wherein faces have turned dark and eyes have gone astray [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا خلیل قم علی امر الجلیل فی هذه الایام التی فیها اسودت الوجوه و زاغت
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @exhortations and counsels, @chastisement and requital, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection of Muhammad, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @suffering and imprisonment, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
